example: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
zh: 將字詞組合成固定片語的技巧
ja: 単語をグループ化して覚える方法

example: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
zh: 一組經常一起出現的字詞
ja: いつも一緒に使われる単語の集まり

example: You just remember the whole phrase.
ja: フレーズ、語句のまとまり

example: This test is a piece of cake.
I was wondering if you could help me.
ja: 丁寧にお願いするときの表現

word: to make a long story short
example: To make a long story short, we missed the train.
I'm looking forward to the weekend.

word: it has nothing to do with
example: It has nothing to do with you.
By the way, how is your family?
